name: Euroxx Securities S.A.
summary: Euroxx Securities S.A., a brokerage firm, provides a range of products and services to the investors in Greece and internationally. The company offers various investment options, such as short-term and long-term credit, stock borrowing, and joint investor share, as well as markets, wealth management, online transactions, and information services to retail investors. It also provides institutional services, including institutional sales; research and analysis; investment banking services, including consulting services for acquisitions and mergers, capital markets, and business financials; purchase, liquidity, credit, operational, and legal risk management services; and information services. Euroxx Securities S.A. was founded in 1993 and is based in Chalandri, Greece.
